title: Amtech B4300 Auto Wire Stripper
availability_text: Only 10 left in stock (more on the way).
features: AUTOMATIC: This automatic wire stripper is suitable for solid and stranded wires from 0.5mm - 4mm diameter
VERSATILE: With a self-adjusting mechanism, these wire stripping pliers also have a handy cable cutter
PRACTICAL SIZE: 0.5mm length provides reach and stability.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Am-Tech offers a broad range of hand tools and with over one thousand product lines, offers a comprehensive range of products to the D.I.Y and professional user. The Am-Tech range of hand tools includes D.I.Y tools, builders tools, automotive tools, measuring, safety wear, tool kits, padlocks, and much more. The entire Am-Tech hand tool range offers unrivaled branding incorporating stylish packaging design with a range of high quality tools. The Am-Tech range continues to grow and new lines are constantly being sourced to make the Am-Tech brand even stronger. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x auto wire stripper See more

specifications_table.Usage: Electrical wiring, DIY projects, home maintenance
